title: Maximum Subarray
description: Given a non-empty array of integers nums, find the subarray with the largest sum and return that sum. A subarray is a contiguous non-empty sequence of elements within an array. For instance: Input=[-2,1,-3,4,-1,2,1,-5], Output=6
inputFormat: A non-empty array of integers nums
outputFormat: The sum of the longest subarray as integer
sampleSolution:
def solve(nums):
    current_sum = nums[0]
    max_sum = current_sum

    for num in nums[1:]:
        current_sum = max(num, current_sum + num)
        max_sum = max(max_sum, current_sum)

    return max_sum
